articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Price Prediction for 2023, 2024, 2025 and Beyond
articles.description: Cardano is one of the most actively developed blockchains with an ambitious roadmap. Its native ADA token has seen immense growth since launching in 2017. This article explores what’s next for Cardano prices. What is Cardano (ADA)? Cardano is an open-source proof-of-stake blockchain network founded by Ethereum co-founder Charles Hoskinson in 2015.
